description_long: This is a modern single bed with a simple, rectangular beige frame and a solid headboard. The bed is topped with a thick, light blue comforter that covers most of the mattress, and a large, coral-colored pillow rests at the head. A white mattress is visible beneath the bedding, providing a clean contrast to the colored linens. Next to the bed is a small, white nightstand with two drawers, and an alarm clock with a red top sits on the nightstand. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, suitable for a contemporary urban bedroom. The bed appears sturdy and is elevated on four square legs, allowing for some under-bed clearance.
description: A modern single bed with a beige frame, blue comforter, coral pillow, and a white nightstand with an alarm clock. The design is minimalistic and functional.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue comforter, coral pillow, and the beige frame with a solid headboard.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the solid beige headboard and the coral pillow, with the nightstand and alarm clock visible.
description_view_2: Side view from the opposite side, showing the nightstand with drawers and the alarm clock next to the bed.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the full width of the bed, the blue comforter, coral pillow, and the nightstand with alarm clock.
